name: tasky.judge
description: Second-pass reviewer over extracted candidates. Runs the Judge (Opus 4.7 via Butterbase AI Gateway) with graph context from Neo4j + cleared-tasks list. Emits one verdict per candidate: keep / drop / merge / subtask.

nodes.description: Assemble the user prompt via lib/prompts/judge.ts:buildJudgeUserPrompt — concatenates source material + candidates + graph context + cleared list.

Ensure every candidate idx has a decision. Validate merge_target_id and subtask_target_id against the graphContext ids. On any validation failure, fall back to verdict=keep for that candidate — safe default that keeps the surface working.
